description: A regular hexagonal prism with a circumscribed circle diameter of 20mm and a height of 35mm.
notes: The hexagon should be centered on the origin. A regular hexagon has a vertex-to-center distance equal to its side length (10mm, since the circumscribed diameter is 20mm). The flat-to-flat distance (inscribed diameter) is exactly 10 * sqrt(3) ≈ 17.32mm. Extrude the sketch symmetrically or from the base plane to a height of 35mm.
